properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amid the countless blessings the Lord has given me The light of truth and goodness; the Holy Spirit's peace I see the many sorrows that his children must endure So much hurt I long to heal. How can I change the world?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There are hands I cannot hold Hearts I cannot comfort Tears that only miracles can stay So let me love and serve and teach Those who come within my reach For miracles begin that way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Savior walked in Galilee, unknown in many lands Yet touching every nation by the labors of his hands Giving light to all the world by teaching but the few He is my example in the work that I must do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will bear the burden of my neighbor in his need I will share my Savior's love in every kindly deed He will magnify my efforts, and I'll understand at last That by these small and simple things are great things brought to pass.
